title: myosotis traversii subsp. cantabrica
intro: Myosotis traversii subsp. cantabrica, also known as the Cantabrian forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of M. traversii subsp. cantabrica include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions or tinctures, are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
